approvedBy: Steve explicit P0 engineering fitness gate approval plus Codex Foundation builder session
approvalSource: Steve approved FOUNDATION-ENGINEERING-FITNESS-GATES-001 before EXTRACTION-RUNTIME-READINESS-001 to make Foundation standards executable across files, APIs, pages, agent routes, verification loops, build artifacts, and runtime truth.
notes: Approved only for Foundation engineering fitness gates: file standards, surface/API budgets, Hub decomposition guard, lazy loading architecture scoping, agent route usage contracts, build-lane failure dogfood, focused proof, closeout, and ship gates. Not approved: extractor implementation, connector/auth work, OAuth, Harlan, Fal, voice, Canva, OpenHuman, broad visual UI redesign, Drive permission mutation, or Agent Feedback auto-send.
